title: Non GATE CSE - Digital Signal Processing - Data Communication

questions.question:
In a baseband communication link, frequencies upto \( 3500 \; \text{Hz} \) are used for signaling. Using a raised cosine pulse with \( 75 \% \) excess bandwidth and for no inter symbol interference, the maximum possible signaling rate is symbols \( \text{per sec} \) is:



Digital Signal Processing: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 47
